Food Brands

About Andrew

I launched
Canada’s largest
plant-based chain.

With over 13 years of marketing and branding experience, my greatest accomplishment has been launching and growing Copper Branch restaurants to over 70 locations worldwide — as Director of Marketing.

My expertise spans the entire marketing spectrum: strategic brand design, campaign execution, franchise marketing, creating compelling stories, and comprehensive marketing planning.

I am committed to helping businesses like yours realize their full potential by developing a strong, consistent, and unforgettable brand image.

Project-Based Work

Not ready for a retainer? Individual projects can be scoped separately. Reach out to discuss your needs and I’ll put together a custom proposal tailored to your goals and timeline.

How It Works

A simple process.
No surprises.

I

Step One

Discovery Call

We have a conversation to better understand your business, goals, and needs. No pressure — just a chance to see if we’re the right fit.

II

Step Two

Custom Proposal

I’ll create a simple, tailored proposal with clear recommendations, priorities, and pricing based on what you shared.

III

Step Three

We Get to Work

Once you accept, we start on the highest-priority projects. You’ll always know the status, timeline, and where your investment is going.

🔒

Confidentiality First. All project-related information and communication are held in strict confidence. A formal NDA and contract are signed before any work begins.
